sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96876" key="stixologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῐχο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96876.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recitation of verses</tr_>, dub. ib.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Lips.: xiii 10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope"> xiii 10</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iv A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
